deviations.what: element binding kept 1:1 - the VerticalLayout binds a one-record structure /S_PRODUCT in the default model instead of {/ProductCollection/0}; titleClicked's MessageBox.alert becomes message_box_display.
the model holds exactly the bound record /ProductCollection/0 (Notebook Basic 15) of ui5/mock/products.json, verbatim - the original's own single-record binding.
